who: HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups using BambooHR for onboarding
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized tech startups processing 5–15 new hires/month, manual paperwork causes delays in new hire integration. We automate onboarding instead of manual processes.
problem: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding challenges
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR tools discussions
try_it: Let users try digital paperwork submission for 1-3 hires
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with clear CTA
Produce a short demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 interviews with target HR managers
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing employee data
Reduce steps required in the onboarding process
